w:r.w:t: modern, minimal, and visually rich website
to showcase a curated collection of Kashmiri handcrafted items.
Display items across multiple craft categories
Allow users to browse and explore the collection
—no payments or checkout functionality will be implemented.
Present the craft collection in a
Ease of use for admin panel
Users will browse visually before reading
compatibility is necessary as in today’s time most of the users will
Users may not purchase instantly but will
Admin panel for full content control
The navbar should have the name of the website on the
side there should be navigation options to
And more for items not categorized and placed later.
And a contact option that directs to enquiry page which will have the same general enquiry section as on the home page with some additional details.
On the home page, the categories should be introduced with images and descriptions with clickable functionality to take the viewer to the
Each category (e.g., Copper, Silver, Jade, Papier-mâché, etc.) will have a
Grid layout of items (1:1 ratio images)
Items to be displayed with a title and description in a minimal fashion.
Horizontally scrollable within card (or modal in future)
Will have a separate tab in admin view that displays all the messages
Confirmation message (“Your enquiry has been submitted”)
Navbar updates dynamically based on categories.
All enquiries in a dedicated section
Meta titles and descriptions for pages
content-driven, visually rich, scalable showcase platform
